title: smp
text: smp When Unicode support is enabled, allow the full range of Unicode characters to be stored in W packing code fields. Syntax USYS$SYB_PARAMS unicode , smp Description By default, Unicode support for W packing codes is limited to characters in the Basic Multilingual Plane (BMP). Specify the option smp to enable storage of the entire Unicode range (Supplementary Multilingual Planes or SMP) in W packing code fields. If this option is not specified, or if the unicode option is not specified, SMP support is disabled. Example: Enabling Unicode Support usys$syb_params charset utf8, unicode, smp, keyword Copy Related Links unicode Enable or disable Unicode support in the SYB connector. Was this topic helpful?
